refnamediv.refpurpose: Finds and registers all faces defined by topology edges.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Registers all faces that can be built out a topology edge primitives.
The target topology is assumed to contain no self-intersecting edges.

note.para: Already known faces are recognized, so it is safe to call Polygonize multiple times on the same topology.
This function does not use nor set the next_left_edge and next_right_edge fields of the edge table.
